compiled_state.title: E2.2: port exists + resolve + format in-process
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Port exists + resolve + format (resolution/display arms) to in-process Python in one cohesive
rebar._engine_support.lookups module.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] exists/resolve/format dispatch in-process via rebar._cli (_LOOKUPS set, full auto-init)
- [ ] Dual-run parity python==bash across all id forms, all format modes, miss/arity/empty
- [ ] Compacted-ticket (SNAPSHOT-only) format fallback parity verified
- [ ] No bash deleted (parity-pinned 2nd impl until E7/E8)

comments.body: DONE (commit ee29e91a). Ported exists/resolve/format to rebar._engine_support.lookups, routed in-process via _LOOKUPS (full auto-init). Dual-run parity 18 scenarios green (all id forms, all format modes auto/canonical/alias/short/unknown-warn, miss/arity/empty); compacted-ticket SNAPSHOT fallback parity verified live (both return short prefix since alias read from CREATE only). interfaces tier 364 passed. CLI-only. No bash deleted.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
